---
title: "GauLSSResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-element Gaussian location-scale fit output."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gaulss`](../nitrix-stats-gaulss.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GauLSSResult -->
```python
class GauLSSResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:GauLSSResult -->
Per-element Gaussian location-scale fit output.

A frozen container holding the fitted coefficients, their asymptotic
covariances, and the maximised log-likelihood for every element of a
mass-univariate Gaussian location-scale regression.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GauLSSResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef_mu: Float[Array, 'V p'], coef_scale: Float[Array, 'V q'], cov_mu: Float[Array, 'V p p'], cov_scale: Float[Array, 'V q q'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], n_obs: int) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:GauLSSResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `q` | random-effect columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
